name: Pumpkin and Tomato Bisque
recipeIngredient: 28 ounces Can Whole tomatoes with juices
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 10-inch skillet, melt the butter or heat oil over medium-low heat.
Add the onion and saute slowly, stirring often, until limp but not brown,
6-7 minutes. Stir in 3 cups stock and let simmer, partially covered, about 15 minutes.
2. Pour the tomatoes with their juice into a food processor. Add the maple syrup or honey, and puree. Add the pumpkin, and pulse. Strain the stock, and add the strained-out onions to the processor. Pulse again, and if an extra smooth soup is desired, process through a blender.
3. Add the tomato-pumpkin purée to the stock. Season with the salt. Reheat, and serve very hot, garnished with red pepper purée if desired. Serves 8-10
